displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #22: The Catastrophe Con, Part III
synopsis: STUCK IN A JUNKYARD JAIL AT WAR. IT CAN'T GET WORSE – RIGHT? I mean, unless you add a vengeful FORCE GHOST. And insane MURDERDROIDS. And a BOR BRAIN-LEECH. And a SENTIENT BIOHAZARD…Surely even rogue archaeologist DOCTOR APHRA can't find a way to make things even worse. Wrong. Because her current beau and her ex are just about to meet…
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #22: The Catastrophe Con, Part III
